name: ztrack
description: Plugins for ztrack — the deterministic done-oracle for agentic SDLC. Currently: ztrack-gate, a ralph-pattern autonomy loop whose completion oracle is `ztrack check` (arm with `ztrack loop start <issue>`).

plugins.name: ztrack-gate
plugins.description: A ralph-pattern autonomy loop whose completion oracle is `ztrack check`, plus a `ztrack` skill that teaches the agent the tracker workflow (evidence, verbs, document sources, honest escapes). Arm with `ztrack loop start <issue>`; while armed, the Stop hook holds the agent's turn until that issue is green (then disarms), or the iteration cap trips. Not armed → the turn ends normally, so it's safe to enable globally.
